reasoning: The NIST 800-53 CM-2-b control focuses on the review and update of baseline configurations. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that key security configurations such as RBAC roles, NetworkPolicies, Pod Security Standards, and API server configurations are regularly reviewed and updated. These elements form the baseline security posture of a Kubernetes cluster, similar to how baseline configurations are managed in cloud environments.
title: Baseline Configuration - Review and update the baseline...
